tokenDoc.name: color-text-primary
tokenDoc.description: The default color for body text, headings, and labels. Provides the highest-contrast text color for standard reading content on default background surfaces.
tokenDoc.summary: Default body text color for light and dark surfaces.

whenToUse.description: When applying color to body text, headings, and form labels on default background surfaces.
When building components that display primary reading content that must adapt across color modes.

whenNotToUse.description: When placing text on dark or colored background surfaces.

alternative.name: color-text-inverse
alternative.rationale: This token is optimized for contrast against light backgrounds. Using it on dark or saturated surfaces will fail contrast requirements.

whenNotToUse.description: When the text is inside a component that supplies its own scoped color tokens (e.g., text on a filled button).

alternative.name: color-text-on-action
alternative.rationale: Component-scoped tokens account for the specific background they sit on. Applying a general text token to a scoped context risks contrast failures.

guidelines.guidance: Use for all body text, headings, and form labels on default background surfaces.
guidelines.rationale: A single primary text color ensures visual consistency and meets WCAG 2.1 AA contrast requirements against the system's default background.

guidelines.guidance: Do not override this token's value at the component level. Use color-text-secondary or color-text-tertiary for reduced emphasis.
guidelines.rationale: Overriding the primary text color creates inconsistency. The system provides lower-emphasis text tokens for visual hierarchy.

guidelines.guidance: This color meets a 15.3:1 contrast ratio against color-background-default in light mode.
guidelines.rationale: Exceeds WCAG 2.1 AAA requirements (7:1 for normal text), ensuring readability for users with low vision.

colorContrast.context: Primary text on default background in light mode.
Primary text on subtle background (card surface) in light mode.
